# plugin-loader

## Plugin reference

- Description: Pure plugin-graph algorithms: topological load-wave partitioning and dependsOn topo-sort, shared by the server/central/web plugin loaders.
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `framework/web-sdk`
- Core:
  - Exports (values):
    - `computeLoadWaves`
    - `topoSortPlugins`
